_readme: Add verified institutional/NGO statements here by hand, after confirming the statement independently (its own official page plus at least one other credible outlet). Summaries must be paraphrased, not quoted verbatim - keep any direct quote under 15 words and use at most one per entry. This file is functionally the same as a news article per SPECIFICATION.md Section 4.5 (title/source/timestamp/link only) - the difference is provenance (human-verified institutional statement vs. automated GDELT collection), not treatment.

statements.title: Amnesty Kenya calls for investigation into election offences ahead of Ol Kalou by-election
statements.summary: Amnesty Kenya urged IEBC, the ODPP, and the EACC to investigate and prosecute reported voter inducement, misuse of public resources, and campaign-period violence ahead of the by-election, and asked IEBC to confirm the vote would not proceed under conditions it could not certify as credible.
verified_via: Amnesty International Kenya's own official statement page
Independent coverage: Daily Nation, The Star, Kenyans.co.ke, KBC Digital, Kahawatungu
